---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or future capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Scope

Which area does this affect?

- [ ] n8n workflow orchestration
- [ ] Provider adapter
- [ ] Criteria checker
- [ ] Safety / approval boundary
- [ ] Validation scripts
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Safety considerations

Could this introduce real provider cost, external write actions, secrets, or user data handling?

## Alternatives considered

Describe any simpler or safer approaches.
